testcase.name: loginPageTitleTest
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [Account Login11] but found [Account Login] at com.opencart.qa.tests.LoginPageTest.loginPageTitleTest(LoginPageTest.java:27)
testcase.system-out: I am in onTestStart method loginPageTitleTest start Account Login11 is not found Login Page title : Account Login I am in onTestFailure method loginPageTitleTest failed Screenshot captured for test case:loginPageTitleTest
testcase.system-err: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for title to be "Account Login11". Current title: "Account Login" (tried for 5 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.39.0', revision: '126f156aee' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.5' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 146.0.7680.80, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 146.0.7680.165 (4b989da09e1..., userDataDir: C:\Users\krish\AppData\Loca...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:49781}, goog:processID: 31088, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:49781/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 146.0.7680.80, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 867f33d6b9a018b1e9a4a546968f84ee at com.opencart.qa.tests.LoginPageTest.loginPageTitleTest(LoginPageTest.java:27) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeMethodAccessorImpl.invoke0(Native Method) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.runTest(SuiteRunner.java:437) at org.testng.SuiteRunner$SuiteWorker.run(SuiteRunner.java:475) at org.testng.internal.thread.ThreadUtil.lambda$execute$0(ThreadUtil.java:58) at
